---
titile: "Link"
comments: false
---

<center>

::: {.btn-group role="group" aria-label="Link"}
<a href="link.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">中文</button></a> <a href="link-en.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">English</button></a>
:::

</center>

# Blog

[Bea Milz](https://beamilz.com/): Inspiring me to bulid my English blog with Quarto

[yihui](https://yihui.org): The first blog I read

[Cryus Yip](https://cyrusyip.org/): Living for himself

[Liechi](https://www.liechi.org): Be like a lighthouse with his thinking

[yuanfan](https://yuanfan.rbind.io): life and thinking

[Velas电波站](https://www.velasx.com/)：The website is exquisite to look at and enviable for its rich content

[The Reasons of the Heart](https://stephenleng.com/)：critical thinking

[太隐](https://wangyurui.com/)：reading, reflecting

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Forum

[Capital Of Statistics](https://cosx.org/): The largest Chinese R forum

[Github](https://github.com): A new world for me
